summary: Complete testing of Weapon Card Redesign + Equipment Expansion (iteration 15). All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including weapon grid cards with wiki images, crosshair placeholders, variant dropdowns, filter buttons, and new equipment categories (Salvage Tool, Scanner, Hacking Tool).

issues: Minor console hydration warnings (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, functionality unaffected (same as iteration 14)

critical_code_review_comments: WEAPON_WIKI_OVERRIDES properly maps 27 weapon names to wiki page titles
fetch_weapon_images() correctly fetches from starcitizen.tools API on startup
get_weapon_image() correctly falls back to empty string for missing images
WeaponCard component correctly handles both image and crosshair placeholder states
Equipment EQUIPMENT list properly includes Salvage Tools (3), Scanners (2), Hacking Tools (2)
TYPE_COLORS includes new types: Salvage Tool (#10B981), Scanner (#38BDF8), Hacking Tool (#F43F5E)
Grid layout uses responsive columns (lg:3, sm:2, 1) for weapons and armor tabs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All weapon card UI tests + equipment filters + regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Weapon images fetched from Star Citizen Wiki API and cached on startup. Equipment items hardcoded in personal_gear.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weapon card redesign with wiki images fully tested and working. 24/38 weapons have wiki images (63% coverage). Missing images show crosshair placeholder. Grid layout with 3 columns on desktop. Equipment expanded from 23 to 30 items with 3 new types: Salvage Tool (3), Scanner (2), Hacking Tool (2). Armor tab unchanged (21 items, 18 with wiki images). Use test user geartest/password123.
